Checklist Item: Semantic-to-div ratio above threshold; pages with >70% generic containers (div/span) flagged
Comments: createElement audit: 93 div + 12 span (105 generic) vs ~55 semantic (button, ul, p, li, nav, main, headings, form, etc.). Generic ratio ~65.6%, below 70% flag threshold. Block JS uses semantic elements for CTAs, lists, nav.

Checklist Item: Correct heading hierarchy maintained
Comments: Blocks preserve authored heading levels (links-column copies source tagName; hero/timelines/our-culture query h1-h6 from content). Programmatic headings (videolist h2/h3, featured-cards h5) augment authored structure without replacing page outline.

Checklist Item: Single h1 per page where applicable
Comments: No block JS creates h1 elements; h1 comes from authored content only. cards-shared.css explicitly preserves h1/h2 for document hierarchy. Component models offer h1 as author choice, not duplicated programmatically.

Checklist Item: DOM source order matches visual tab order; no positive tabindex values; CSS order/flex-direction does not contradict DOM sequence
Comments: No positive tabindex (only 0/-1). However flex-direction:row-reverse used in links-column icon links, slider switch-position, and teaser layouts reverses visual order vs DOM tab sequence.

Checklist Item: Page content hierarchy intact: headings and body text present in raw HTML source; critical content not injected solely via JavaScript; no content exclusively hidden via inline style or JS-only class toggling
Comments: EDS delivers authored headings/body in page HTML; blocks decorate existing DOM rows. innerHTML clears restructure block children, not replace with JS-only text. style.display toggles are UI controls (cart counter, play/pause), not hiding main content.

Checklist Item: Avoid excessive DOM depth
Comments: EDS block structure uses deeply nested div wrappers (default-section > div > div > block rows). Multiple blocks append additional wrapper divs increasing depth beyond recommended limits.

Checklist Item: Radio/checkbox groups wrapped in fieldset with legend; forms with 3+ related inputs have grouping
Comments: No fieldset/legend usage in blocks or scripts. No radio/checkbox form groups found with semantic grouping.

Checklist Item: All inputs have associated labels
Comments: No standalone form inputs in block JS; interactive controls use buttons with aria-label (language-selector, modal close). No unlabeled input elements found.

Checklist Item: Placeholder not used as label
Comments: No placeholder attributes used on form inputs in blocks/scripts source.

Checklist Item: Error messages programmatically associated with inputs via aria-describedby or aria-errormessage; error containers use role='alert' or aria-live='assertive'; error text is non-empty and >10 characters
Comments: No aria-describedby/aria-errormessage error association, role=alert, or aria-live assertive patterns found for form validation errors.

Checklist Item: Avoid inline styles
Comments: JS sets element.style.display in header (cart counter), teaser (play/pause), editor-support. Not widespread but present.

Checklist Item: Accessible names for interactive elements
Comments: 39+ aria-label/aria-labelledby usages across blocks (modal, language-selector, slider, header). Buttons and links have text or aria-label.

Checklist Item: Images with role='presentation' or aria-hidden='true' have empty alt; standalone without adjacent text and without alt flagged; hero/banner images verified to have non-empty alt >10 chars; in decorative containers verified to have empty alt or role='presentation'
Comments: Decorative images use aria-hidden + empty alt (language-selector, videolist, cards). order-now sets meaningful alt fallback for hero images.

Checklist Item: Alt text is not a filename or path; not generic (image/photo/icon/picture/graphic/banner/logo without qualifier); between 5-125 characters; does not duplicate adjacent text content; does not begin with 'image of'/'picture of'/'photo of'; alt on linked images describes destination
Comments: Code cannot enforce alt length/quality on authored content. videolist sets img.alt='' for thumbnails; alt quality depends on CMS authoring without validation.

Checklist Item: Tables use thead and tbody
Comments: comparison-table uses div grid with role=table, not semantic table/thead/tbody elements.

Checklist Item: Table headers use th
Comments: Headers use role=columnheader on div cells, not th elements.

Checklist Item: Lists use ul or ol correctly
Comments: Lists created with createElement('ul') in links-column, language-selector, cards, slider, featured-cards.

Checklist Item: Page <title> exists; is >10 characters; not a default value (Untitled/Document/Home/Page/Website/Welcome); follows consistent pattern across site (e.g. 'Page - Site' or 'Page | Site' separator detected)
Comments: document.title set from page metadata in scripts/delayed.js; 404.html has meaningful title. Not default Untitled values.

Checklist Item: Meta viewport configured correctly
Comments: viewport meta width=device-width, initial-scale=1 in head.html and 404.html.

Checklist Item: No duplicate IDs
Comments: No duplicate static id attributes found across blocks/scripts grep scan.

Checklist Item: No invalid HTML nesting
Comments: Block JS uses valid nesting (dialog>div, ul>li, button>img). No invalid parent-child combinations found in programmatic DOM.

Checklist Item: HTML validates without errors
Comments: head.html lacks charset meta and html wrapper; full page validation not run. Cannot confirm zero validator errors without built pages.

Checklist Item: ARIA roles do not duplicate native semantics
Comments: comparison-table sets role=table/row/cell on divs duplicating table semantics. links-column sets role=button on heading elements.

Checklist Item: Avoid misuse of ARIA roles
Comments: role=button applied to heading elements in mobile footer accordion (links-column) instead of using native button.

Checklist Item: ARIA used only when necessary
Comments: ARIA roles used on comparison-table div grid where native table would suffice; decorative spans use aria-hidden appropriately.

Checklist Item: Meta tags do not block zoom
Comments: No user-scalable=no or maximum-scale=1 in viewport meta.

Checklist Item: No broken links (run broken-link-checker or linkinator CLI against local build or source HTML)
Comments: Broken link checker (linkinator) not run against local build during audit.

Checklist Item: CSS variables used for all colors
Comments: :root and styles.css map colors to --color-* design tokens from tailwind.css shared token system.

Checklist Item: CSS variables used for spacing scale
Comments: Spacing scale defined as --spacing-* tokens in tailwind.css, used in block CSS via var(--spacing-N).

Checklist Item: CSS variables used for typography scale
Comments: Typography uses --text-* and --heading-font-size-* tokens in styles.css mapped to shared design system.

Checklist Item: No hardcoded hex/rgb color values
Comments: 21 hardcoded hex/rgb values in block/component CSS files not referencing var(--color-*) tokens.

Checklist Item: No hardcoded pixel spacing where tokens exist
Comments: ~220 hardcoded px values in CSS despite --spacing-* tokens being available.

Checklist Item: Consistent naming conventions
Comments: EDS block naming convention: block-name, block-name-wrapper, element classes consistent across blocks.

Checklist Item: Class names do not contain hex values or color names as identifiers; no purely positional names (left1/col2); BEM or project naming convention pattern enforced
Comments: Class names follow semantic BEM-like block patterns (hero-content, comparison-grid); no hex/color positional names like left1.

Checklist Item: CSS selectors for same component co-located in same file; no duplicate selectors scattered across files; related rules grouped by component
Comments: Each block has co-located block.css in same directory. Component rules grouped by block.

Checklist Item: Layout containers use display:flex or display:grid; no float:left/right for multi-column layouts; no display:table for non-tabular content; absolute positioning in <5% of layout containers
Comments: Layouts use flexbox/grid extensively. No float:left/right for columns. Minimal display:table usage.

Checklist Item: min-width media queries outnumber max-width queries; base styles (outside media queries) target mobile viewport dimensions
Comments: max-width media queries (27) outnumber min-width (23) across CSS. Mobile-first not consistently applied.

Checklist Item: Standard breakpoints only
Comments: Uses standard Tailwind-aligned breakpoints (768px, 1024px, etc.) via tailwind config and media queries.

Checklist Item: Responsive images by default
Comments: order-now and language-selector build picture/source/srcset for responsive images. EDS optimizes images via pipeline.

Checklist Item: Avoid z-index escalation
Comments: 30 z-index declarations total; no extreme escalation (values mostly 1-10 range).

Checklist Item: Avoid expensive box-shadows
Comments: Box shadows use tokenized --shadow-* values; no excessive blur spread combinations.

Checklist Item: Avoid heavy CSS filters
Comments: Minimal CSS filter usage; no heavy filter:blur() chains found in block CSS.

Checklist Item: No infinite CSS animations on non-loading elements; animation duration under 1s; total animation count per page within threshold
Comments: Only 1 @keyframes rule found; no infinite animations on content elements.

Checklist Item: All CSS properties/values supported in target browsers (checked against caniuse compatibility data); no unprefixed experimental features without fallbacks
Comments: Uses widely-supported CSS (flexbox, grid, custom properties, dialog). No experimental unprefixed features without fallbacks.

Checklist Item: Avoid vendor prefixes unless required
Comments: Minimal -webkit/-moz vendor prefixes; autoprefixer handles necessary prefixes via PostCSS.

Checklist Item: No duplicated CSS rules
Comments: Block-scoped CSS prevents major duplication; shared utilities in scripts/shared-utils and styles/styles.css.

Checklist Item: No unused CSS selectors
Comments: EDS loads block CSS per-block on demand, reducing unused CSS on any given page.

Checklist Item: Consistent property ordering
Comments: stylelint-config-standard enforces consistent CSS formatting via lint:css script.

Checklist Item: No blocking scripts in head
Comments: head.html scripts use type=module (deferred by default). No blocking synchronous scripts without defer/async.

Checklist Item: Use async or defer appropriately
Comments: Scripts use type=module (implicit defer). Martech plugins use preload hints.

Checklist Item: Third-party scripts lazy loaded
Comments: Martech/OneTrust loaded via preload + delayed.js, not blocking initial render.

Checklist Item: No JS files loaded on pages where their exports are unused; code-split bundles match route usage
Comments: EDS loads block JS only when block appears on page via loadBlock(). No full bundle on every page.

Checklist Item: No marketing tags in head
Comments: No marketing/analytics script tags inline in head.html; martech loaded via delayed.js.

Checklist Item: User-facing strings in component render/template functions reference i18n keys or constants; hardcoded display strings >3 words flagged
Comments: Hardcoded English strings in JS (e.g. order-now alt fallback, slider labels). No i18n key system for user-facing strings.

Checklist Item: No binaries stored in repository
Comments: Only font woff2 and icon assets in repo; no committed binary executables or archives.

Checklist Item: Error messages follow consistent pattern (checked via regex); no raw string throws; error constants or error classes used
Comments: Minimal throw usage; errors handled via try/catch and early returns. No raw string throw spam.

Checklist Item: Avoid tight DOM coupling
Comments: Blocks use decorate(block) pattern operating on block scope, not global DOM selectors.

Checklist Item: Avoid forced synchronous layouts
Comments: timelines.js reads offsetWidth, offsetLeft, getComputedStyle, getBoundingClientRect in scroll handlers causing layout thrashing.

Checklist Item: All setTimeout/setInterval calls have corresponding clear calls; timer count per file within threshold (max 3); no timers <100ms
Comments: Only 5 timer usages total. carousel-utils setInterval paired with clearInterval on pause/destroy.

Checklist Item: setInterval for DOM/state checks flagged (suggest MutationObserver/IntersectionObserver/EventListener); polling intervals <1s flagged
Comments: setInterval only used for carousel autoplay interval, not DOM state polling. Uses IntersectionObserver in carousel-utils.

Checklist Item: Prefer native browser APIs
Comments: Uses native dialog, fetch, IntersectionObserver, CustomEvent, matchMedia APIs.

Checklist Item: Modern ES6+ syntax used
Comments: ES modules with import/export, arrow functions, async/await, destructuring, spread operator throughout.

Checklist Item: Avoid memory leaks
Comments: Carousel clears intervals on destroy; modal uses dialog.close(). No unbounded listener accumulation patterns found.

Checklist Item: Event listeners cleaned up properly
Comments: 84 addEventListener vs 23 removeEventListener. Many listeners on long-lived elements without teardown (acceptable for page-lifetime EDS blocks but below cleanup threshold).

Checklist Item: Async logic uses async/await
Comments: Async functions use async/await (modal, fragment, featured-cards API calls).

Checklist Item: Promises handled correctly
Comments: Promises use await or .catch() (teaser video play). API errors throw with status checks.

Checklist Item: State changes occur through defined setters/reducers/actions; no direct state object property mutations outside state management layer
Comments: N/A for vanilla EDS blocks; no centralized state store. Block-local state only via classList and DOM attributes.

Checklist Item: No mutation of shared state
Comments: No shared mutable application state object; blocks operate on scoped DOM only.

Checklist Item: No side effects in pure functions
Comments: Utility functions in scripts/shared-utils are pure; decorate functions intentionally mutate block DOM.

Checklist Item: Consistent return types
Comments: Exported decorate functions consistently return void/undefined. Async helpers return Promise consistently.

Checklist Item: No global variables
Comments: All block code uses ES modules; no var declarations polluting window except framework window.hlx.

Checklist Item: JS scoped to component or block
Comments: Each EDS block has its own JS module scoped via decorate(block) parameter.

Checklist Item: Consistent coding style
Comments: ESLint + Stylelint configured; consistent import/export and formatting across blocks.

Checklist Item: Avoid deeply nested callbacks
Comments: No callback pyramids; uses async/await and flat event handlers.

Checklist Item: Call chain depth <=4 levels; wrapper functions that only delegate flagged; files with >80% re-exports flagged
Comments: Call chains remain shallow; no files dominated by re-exports.

Checklist Item: All external inputs are validated, sanitized, and securely handled to prevent errors, misuse, and security vulnerabilities
Comments: DOMPurify included for sanitization. API responses validated (featured-cards checks res.ok, token). Fragment HTML loaded from trusted AEM paths.

Checklist Item: No unreachable code
Comments: No unreachable code blocks detected after return statements in block JS.

Checklist Item: No empty catch blocks
Comments: Empty catch blocks in teaser.js video play handlers (.catch(() => {})).

Checklist Item: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance met
Comments: Multiple WCAG gaps: row-reverse tab order, missing table semantics, ARIA misuse, missing video captions, hover/focus parity gaps.

Checklist Item: Announce dynamic content changes
Comments: No aria-live regions for dynamic content updates (carousel slide changes, cart count updates).

Checklist Item: Modal/dialog elements have role='dialog' or role='alertdialog' with aria-modal='true' and aria-labelledby/aria-label; keydown handler for Escape key present in source; focusable elements exist inside dialog container
Comments: Uses native <dialog> element with aria-label on close button. Native dialog provides Escape key and focus trap.

Checklist Item: <video> elements have <track kind='captions'> with valid non-empty src
Comments: videolist and teaser video elements lack <track kind='captions'> elements.

Checklist Item: <audio> elements have adjacent transcript link or aria-describedby pointing to transcript content; transcript container visible (not display:none/visibility:hidden)
Comments: No <audio> elements in codebase; requirement N/A.

Checklist Item: No focus-trap calls outside of modal/dialog components; no keydown handlers that programmatically restrict Tab key to a subset of elements on non-modal pages
Comments: No focus-trap logic outside native dialog. Tab management limited to carousel inactive slides (aria-hidden).

Checklist Item: Visible focus styles present
Comments: :focus and :focus-visible styles in skip-to-main, styles.css, and block CSS. --shadow-focus-ring token defined.

Checklist Item: All CSS :hover rules have corresponding :focus or :focus-visible rules on the same selectors
Comments: 33 :hover rules vs 29 :focus/:focus-visible rules; some hover-only styles lack focus counterparts.

Checklist Item: Visually-hidden patterns (.sr-only/.visually-hidden) use approved clip/position technique; no display:none or visibility:hidden on screen-reader-targeted text
Comments: Skip-to-main uses position:absolute off-screen pattern with focus reveal (approved technique). No display:none on SR-targeted text.

Checklist Item: No eval() or Function(string) usage
Comments: No eval() or Function(string) in application source.

Checklist Item: No document.write or document.writeln
Comments: No document.write/writeln usage.

Checklist Item: External scripts use Subresource Integrity (SRI) where applicable
Comments: No SRI integrity attributes on external CDN scripts (cookielaw.org, adobedc.net preconnects). First-party scripts served from same origin.

Checklist Item: No unsanitized user input in innerHTML or dangerous sinks
Comments: innerHTML used in content-block (author text), fragment loader, back-to-top button HTML. DOMPurify present but not applied to all innerHTML sinks.

Checklist Item: No hardcoded API keys or secrets in source
Comments: No hardcoded API keys, secrets, or tokens in source files.

Checklist Item: No credentials or tokens in URLs or query parameters
Comments: No credentials or tokens passed in URL query parameters.

Checklist Item: No sensitive data in client-side comments or console logs
Comments: No sensitive data in comments or console.log statements.

Checklist Item: No insecure storage usage (localStorage/sessionStorage/Cookies or other browser storage for secrets)
Comments: localStorage used for order-bag and order-location keys (header.js, utils.js). Not secrets but browser storage for app state.

Checklist Item: No PII stored in cookies or browser storage without encryption or consent
Comments: order-location stored in localStorage without visible encryption/consent flow in EDS code.

Checklist Item: No known vulnerable dependencies (npm audit / Snyk)
Comments: npm install/ci fails (workspace:* protocol); npm audit could not be executed in this monorepo sub-package.

Checklist Item: No sensitive data exposed in client-visible IDs or data attributes
Comments: No sensitive PII in data-* attributes; data-aue-prop used for AEM instrumentation only.

Checklist Item: Zero lint errors (ESLint/Stylelint)
Comments: eslint not executable (command not found; npm install fails due to workspace protocol). Cannot verify zero lint errors.

Checklist Item: No unused variables
Comments: Cannot verify without running ESLint (deps not installable in isolation).

Checklist Item: No unused functions
Comments: Cannot verify without ESLint execution.

Checklist Item: No unused imports
Comments: Cannot verify without ESLint execution.

Checklist Item: No dead code paths
Comments: No obvious unreachable branches or dead code paths in block modules.

Checklist Item: No dead code files (unreferenced modules)
Comments: All block folders referenced via EDS block loading and component-definition.json.

Checklist Item: No commented-out production code
Comments: No large blocks of commented-out production code found.

Checklist Item: No implicit globals
Comments: ES modules prevent implicit globals; eslint no-implicit-globals configured.

Checklist Item: Consistent file structure
Comments: Consistent EDS block structure: block.js, block.css, _block.json per component.

Checklist Item: No duplicated constants
Comments: Shared constants in scripts/shared-utils and carousel-utils; design tokens centralized in tailwind.css.

Checklist Item: Variable names >2 characters (excluding loop iterators i/j/k/x/y); no single-letter variables outside loops; no anti-pattern names (temp/tmp/data/val/stuff/thing/foo/bar without qualifier); camelCase or snake_case consistent per file
Comments: Descriptive camelCase variable names throughout blocks (headingElement, comparisonRows, featuredProductsList).

Checklist Item: Function names start with verb (get/set/is/has/should/create/update/delete/handle/render/fetch/parse/validate/transform/format/check/find/load/save/remove/add/init/build/compute/on); names >4 characters; no generic names (doStuff/handleIt/process/run without descriptive suffix)
Comments: Functions use verb prefixes: createModal, loadFragment, decorate, buildBlock, wireExternalLinkButtons.

Checklist Item: Consistent naming conventions
Comments: Consistent camelCase JS and kebab-case CSS class naming across project.

Checklist Item: No nested ternary expressions beyond 1 level; no if/else chains >4 branches (suggest switch/object-map); boolean expressions <=3 conditions per statement; complex boolean expressions without intermediate named variable flagged
Comments: No deeply nested ternaries or excessive if/else chains found in block JS.

Checklist Item: Functions with if-block wrapping >80% of function body flagged for guard-clause inversion; nested if-else >3 levels deep where outermost condition is validation/type-check flagged for early return
Comments: Decorate functions use early returns (if (!rows?.length) return). No >3 level nested if-else chains.

Checklist Item: Average file size under 500 LOC; functions under 40 lines; module boundaries well-defined
Comments: featured-cards.js is 510 LOC (exceeds 500 threshold). timelines.js 428 LOC. Most other block files under limit.

Checklist Item: Files have single responsibility and clear module boundaries
Comments: Each block module handles one component concern with clear decorate() boundary.

Checklist Item: README present
Comments: README.md present with project description.

Checklist Item: Consistent error handling strategy
Comments: API calls check res.ok and throw Error with status; async/await with try/catch patterns in featured-cards.

Checklist Item: Errors logged meaningfully
Comments: Errors thrown with descriptive messages including HTTP status codes.

Checklist Item: Errors fail gracefully
Comments: Blocks degrade gracefully on missing data (early returns when rows empty). API failures throw without crashing page.

Checklist Item: Avoid magic numbers
Comments: Spacing and sizing use CSS token variables; carousel uses named constants for breakpoints (768px via matchMedia).

Checklist Item: Constants centralized
Comments: Design tokens centralized in tailwind.css; SLIDER_* constants in carousel-utils.

Checklist Item: Config-driven behavior
Comments: Component models (_*.json) drive author-configurable behavior. paths.json and fstab.yaml for routing.

Checklist Item: Shared utilities extracted
Comments: Shared utilities in scripts/shared-utils/, carousel-utils.js, dom-helpers.js reused across blocks.

Checklist Item: Duplicate code percentage within standard threshold
Comments: Shared carousel, card, and DOM utilities reduce duplication across blocks.

Checklist Item: No hardcoded environment values
Comments: Uses window.hlx.codeBasePath and relative paths; no hardcoded prod/staging URLs in block logic.

Checklist Item: Avoid circular dependencies
Comments: Import graph is acyclic: blocks import scripts/aem.js and shared-utils, not vice versa.

Checklist Item: No stale TODO/FIXME comments; no comments referencing symbols that do not exist in scope; no commented-out code blocks
Comments: Only 1 TODO/FIXME found in codebase. No stale commented-out code blocks.

Checklist Item: commented-out code blocks >3 lines flagged; TODO/FIXME without issue-tracker reference flagged;
Comments: No commented-out blocks >3 lines. Minimal TODO count without issue refs but only 1 instance.

Checklist Item: Charset meta tag (<meta charset="UTF-8">) declared in <head> before any content-producing elements; charset declaration appears within first 1024 bytes of document
Comments: head.html lacks <meta charset="UTF-8"> tag.

Checklist Item: Language attribute (lang) on <html> element is a valid BCP 47 tag matching page content language; lang attribute not empty or set to 'undefined'
Comments: document.documentElement.lang = 'en' set in scripts/scripts.js.

Checklist Item: Direction attribute (dir) specified on <html> or relevant container elements for RTL language pages; value is 'ltr' or 'rtl' matching content language direction
Comments: English-only site; default ltr direction applies. No RTL pages requiring dir attribute.

Checklist Item: If CSS print stylesheet (@media print) is defined, print styles hide non-essential UI elements (navigation/footer/sidebar/ads)
Comments: No @media print stylesheet defined; requirement N/A.

Checklist Item: Font-family declarations defined at :root or body level using CSS custom properties; component-level stylesheets reference font-family tokens instead of hardcoding font names
Comments: Font families defined as --font-sans, --font-sans-condensed tokens in tailwind.css; body uses var(--body-font-family).

Checklist Item: Content elements have explicit width and height HTML attributes or CSS aspect-ratio set to reserve layout space and prevent CLS
Comments: Only some images set dimensions (modal close icon width/height). Most block-created images lack explicit width/height or aspect-ratio for CLS prevention.

Checklist Item: No unused npm/yarn packages in package.json; depcheck or npm-check analysis confirms all listed dependencies are imported in source code
Comments: Cannot run depcheck; monorepo workspace deps (workspace:*) prevent isolated npm install verification.

Checklist Item: No setState/dispatch/state-mutation calls inside for/while/do-while/forEach/map/reduce loops; state updates batched or moved outside iteration blocks
Comments: N/A — no React setState/dispatch; vanilla EDS DOM manipulation only.

Checklist Item: No unused component props passed from parent to child; unused prop detection via static analysis or TypeScript strict mode
Comments: N/A — no React component props; EDS uses authored content models.

Checklist Item: Git repository initialized with .git directory present; remote origin configured; repository is not in detached HEAD state
Comments: .git is a symlink to parent monorepo .git (postinstall script), not a standalone repo initialization in this package directory.

Checklist Item: .gitignore file present and includes standard exclusions (node_modules; dist/build output; .env files; OS files; IDE config); no build artifacts or dependency folders committed
Comments: .gitignore excludes node_modules, coverage, logs, .DS_Store, .idea, build artifacts.

Checklist Item: Package lock file (package-lock.json or yarn.lock) committed to repository; lock file version matches package.json dependencies; no conflicting lock files present
Comments: No package-lock.json in digital-ecomm-eds-main directory; monorepo lock file likely at parent root.

Checklist Item: Pre-commit hooks configured (husky; lint-staged; or lefthook); hooks run linting and formatting before each commit; .husky directory or equivalent present
Comments: No husky, lint-staged, or lefthook configuration found.

Checklist Item: Node.js version specified via engines field in package.json; version is LTS or current stable
Comments: No engines field in package.json specifying Node.js version.

Checklist Item: Hardcoded mock data or example values left in production code (e.g. 'John Doe'; 'test@example.com'; 'Lorem ipsum'; '123 Main St'; placeholder UUIDs); regex pattern scan across source files
Comments: No hardcoded mock data (John Doe, test@example.com, Lorem ipsum, placeholder UUIDs) found in source.
